title: Mossypacks Performance: FeatherLite
description: A lightweight performance modpack to boost your fps and over all performance enhancing.
body:
# FeatherLite - Performance Enhanced Minecraft 1.21.+

**FeatherLite** is a carefully curated performance-focused modpack for Minecraft 1.21.+, designed to significantly improve client-side and server-side performance while keeping the vanilla experience intact. It's ideal for low-end PCs, laptops, or anyone seeking a smoother experience without sacrificing gameplay fidelity.

---

## 🚀 Features

- **Massive FPS Boost** through modern rendering and culling optimizations (Sodium, MoreCulling, CullLeaves, Dynamic FPS).
- **Improved World Loading & Multithreading** thanks to C2ME and Lithium.
- **Memory & CPU Usage Optimizations** with FerriteCore, ModernFix, and Noisium.
- **Faster Entity and Block Updates** via Alternate Current and Enhanced Block Entities.
- **Efficient Mob Drops & XP** via Clumps and GetItTogetherDrops.
- **QoL Enhancements** like ModMenu and Cloth Config for easy customization.

---

## 🛠️ Included Core Mods

| Category | Mods |
|---------|------|
| **Rendering** | Sodium, Sodium Extra, MoreCulling, CullLeaves, EntityCulling, Dynamic FPS |
| **Multithreading & Worldgen** | C2ME, Lithium, FerriteCore, Noisium |
| **Visual Improvements** | BetterGrass, BetterBeds, Cubes Without Borders |
| **Efficiency & Fixes** | ModernFix, CollisionFix, LetMeDespawn |
| **Redstone & Blocks** | Alternate Current, Enhanced Block Entities |
| **Misc Performance** | Clumps, LeavesBeGone, GetItTogetherDrops |
| **Frameworks** | Fabric API, Cloth Config, ForgeConfigAPI Port |
| **UI & Config** | ModMenu, Reese’s Sodium Options |

---

## 📦 Technical Info

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.+  
- **Mod Loader**: [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net)  
- **Compatible with**: Low-end and mid-range hardware

---

## ✅ Recommended Settings

- Enable VBOs and Fast Render
- Set Sodium’s "Chunk Memory Allocator" to *Threaded*
- Enable Entity Culling and configure CullLeaves for max FPS
- Adjust Dynamic FPS for background performance

---

## 📥 Installation

You can install this pack easily via the Modrinth launcher or any Fabric-compatible launcher like Prism, ATLauncher, or MultiMC.

1. Install the [Fabric Loader 0.16.14+](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Drop all mods into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch and enjoy a lag-free experience!

---

## 💡 Notes

- This modpack is strictly **vanilla-friendly** and does **not** add new content or change core mechanics.
- Ideal for SMP and client use alike.
- Built for maximum stability on **Java 21** with full 1.21.1 support.

---

**FeatherLite** gives you a buttery-smooth Minecraft without clutter or compromise — **just pure performance.**


### If you are a mod developer and do not want your mod to be included in my modpack, please contact me and I will remove it as soon as possible. You can find my contact details in my [Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Varamos)
